---
title: "Portfolio (under Construction)"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

This page can be considered my portfolio. This portfolio covers some of my favourite posts and projects, across both marine biology and data. Consider it a demonstration of some work I am proud of and capable of.

Note: Some of these projects, may be updated as I learn, grow and improve. I will be looking into displaying previous versions where needed.
